summary: purl is a CLI for calling APIs, including HTTP 402/x402 pay-per-request APIs, using wallet-backed payment flow.

auth.instructions: Install purl, configure a wallet with `purl wallet add`, then invoke endpoints directly with the purl command.

cli.install: Install via the purl docs: https://www.purl.dev/docs

commands.name: wallet add
commands.description: Adds/configures a wallet for paying 402 challenges.

commands.name: request free endpoint
commands.description: Calls a free test endpoint through purl.

commands.name: request paid endpoint
commands.description: Demonstrates a paid request flow where purl handles HTTP 402 settlement.
